title: Surgeon Vacancy at Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Surgeon to strengthen our Jabalpur-based team.

About Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital:
Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
